# S-6 fixture — malicious hook-input paths whose run_id capture must be refused.
#
# Exercises: plugins/preview-forge/hooks/auto-retro-trigger.py
#   SCORE_REPORT / FAILED_FLAG regexes.
#
# One payload per line. All lines MUST fail to match (find_run_id returns
# None). The verify script iterates each line and asserts non-match.
#
# Canonical matching paths (these SHOULD match, used by verify to prove
# the regex still accepts legitimate inputs — listed after the `---OK---`
# separator).

runs/../score/report.json
runs/../../score/report.json
runs/./score/report.json
runs/.. /score/report.json
runs/r-../score/report.json
runs/r-12345678-123456extra/score/report.json
runs/r-12345678/score/report.json
runs/r-1234567-123456/score/report.json
runs/r-12345678-12345/score/report.json
runs/r-/score/report.json
runs/r-12345678-123456/score/report.json.bak
runs/../failed.flag
runs/r-12345678-123456extra/failed.flag
runs/r-12345678-123456/failed.flag.bak
runs/.../failed.flag
---OK---
runs/r-20260423-221530/score/report.json
runs/r-19700101-000000/score/report.json
runs/r-20260424-000001/failed.flag
